svg.text: Regime detection · risk control · hedge overlay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What volatility signals are used to identify market regimes?')
sendPrompt('How does macro data feed into a regime detection model?')
sendPrompt('How is cross-asset correlation shift used in regime detection?')
sendPrompt('How is market microstructure used as a regime indicator?')
sendPrompt('Explain how Hidden Markov Models are used for market regime classification')
g.text: States: risk-on · risk-off · trending · mean-reverting · crisis · low-vol carry
Transition matrix updated daily · Bayesian update · regime confidence score 0–1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do you adjust strategy parameters during a risk-on regime?')
sendPrompt('How do you adjust a quantitative strategy during a trending regime?')
sendPrompt('How do you defend a quant portfolio during a crisis or risk-off regime?')
sendPrompt('What are the full suite of pre-trade and post-trade risk controls used at top quant funds?')
g.text: VaR (1d 99%) · CVaR · max drawdown limit · gross/net exposure cap · ADV% cap
single-name concentration · factor exposure limit · liquidity-adjusted position size
real-time P&L monitor → automatic de-lever trigger → kill-switch at −N% NAV

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What hedge overlays are used in systematic equity funds for tail and delta risk?')
g.text: index puts · VIX calls · variance swap

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are circuit breakers and kill switches in systematic trading systems?')
